---
title: "EDS M1: Digital Tools"
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
---

## Welcome

This presentation demonstrates an R-only Reveal.js slide deck built with Quarto.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## R Chunk: Summary Statistics

```{R}
summary(mtcars)
```

{{< include ../../shared-assets/disclaimer.qmd >}}
